rules: NEVER use Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, or Lato.
Headlines > 32px MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Overlines/Labels MUST be Uppercase, text-xs, tracking-[0.2em].
Line height: leading-none for headers, leading-relaxed for body.
H1 max text-5xl (fluid clamp preferable), H2 max text-4xl.
NO purple-white gradients. NO teal blue/green for actions.
Use 'Tinted Grey' - all neutrals must have a warm (orange/yellow) undertone.
Text color must explicitly change on hover (e.g., hover:bg-[#1B3127] hover:text-white).
Focus states must have higher contrast than default.
Limit the use of primary color to CTAs only.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-6, p-8, p-12) for containers, dense spacing for data tables.
rules: Dashboards use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6.
Every pixel utilized. Use h-full on children to ensure stretch. No jagged bottoms.
Containers with borders MUST have p-6 or p-8 internal padding.
Mobile images max-h-[80vh].

cards.style: Neumorphic/Clay variant without heavy shadows. Flat solid background, rounded-sm (4px max), 1px subtle border (#E2DFD8).

buttons.style: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) to contrast sharp cards. High contrast text.

forms_and_inputs.style: Always use Shadcn Input, Select, Form. rounded-sm, border-[#E2DFD8], bg-transparent. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C85A3C]
forms_and_inputs.note: Left-align labels. Provide clear active/focus states. Use Shadcn calendar for date pickers.

tables.style: Dense padding (py-2 px-4). Header row bg-[#F6F4F1] border-b border-[#E2DFD8]. Keep rows clean white, no alternating row colors.

navigation.style: Sidebar navigation: bg-[#13241D] text-[#E2DFD8]. Active link: bg-[#1B3127] text-white border-l-4 border-[#C85A3C].
navigation.header: Solid surface bg-white border-b border-[#E2DFD8]. NO transparent headers. EVER.

rules: Hover states for ALL interactive elements.
Use specific transitions (e.g., transition-transform duration-200 ease-out), NEVER transition-all.
Micro-animations on buttons (active:scale-95).
Respect prefers-reduced-motion.

icons_and_assets.instructions: Use Phosphor Icons for dense dashboards. Install via yarn add @phosphor-icons/react.

login_hero.context: Background or split-screen image for the login/signup page.

empty_state_invoices.context: Empty state illustration for 'No Invoices' or 'No Flats Assigned'.

rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
Minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text.
Use pure solid backgrounds for medical/financial/management data to prevent visual refraction.

instructions_to_main_agent: Read this guideline entirely before building components.
Install required dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react sonner date-fns
Update tailwind.config.js to include Outfit and Manrope font families.
Apply global CSS variables for the color palette as per the archetype.
Prioritize Shadcn components (using the .jsx files present in /app/frontend/src/components/ui) and modify their classes to match the rounded-sm / border settings.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects ONLY where applicable (not for dashboards). Dashboards use Solid surfaces.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, i.e. do not add .App { text-align: center; }.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. NEVER use placeholder text for images.
Use sonner for toasts, component located in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.jsx.
All components must be .jsx and functional components.
